ordinanceLabel: Los Altos Municipal Code · Municode · Title 12 (Building) · Title 14 (Zoning) · Chapter 14.14 (ADU)
fireAgency: Santa Clara County Fire Department (SCCFD) · 650-947-2779 · sccfd.org
fhszNote: Predominantly no FHSZ designation. 2025 CAL Fire LRA map pending final adoption as of April 2026; western parcels near Los Altos Hills border may receive Moderate/High designation.
reachCodeNote: All-electric mandate for all new construction (LAMC Title 12, eff. 2023-01-01). No gas/propane in new buildings. Cooking appliance/fireplace exception for new SFR.
suggestedQuestions: What are the ADU size and setback rules in Los Altos?
